headline: Agilent Deepens India Biologics Ties While Targeting High Speed Debugging
summary: Agilent Technologies (NYSE:A) has teamed up with Veeda Lifesciences to set up a Center of Excellence in India focused on advanced analytical workflows for complex biologics and next generation therapies. The company is also expanding its collaboration with C-CAMP to broaden access to high resolution analytical platforms for startups and researchers. In parallel, Agilent has introduced the 16850 Series portable logic analyzers aimed at high speed digital system debugging. Agilent...
